name: Dynasty Gold Corp.
summary: Dynasty Gold Corp., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company primarily explores for gold. It owns a 100% interest in the Golden Repeat property that includes 49 claims totaling 980 acres located in northwestern Elko County, Nevada; and a 70% interest in the Qi-2 gold resource property located in the Xinjiang Province of China. Dynasty Gold Corp. also has an option agreement to earn a 100% interest in the Thundercloud gold property located on the central Wabigoon greenstone belt in western Ontario. The company was formerly known as C Squared Developments Inc. and changed its name to Dynasty Gold Corp. in May 2003. Dynasty Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
